title: Direct Routing and Bounded Worker Pools · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a capacity-aware Go work distribution service. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a capacity-aware Go work distribution service with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Design direct exchange bindings that keep producer intent stable while consumer queues evolve; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use one queue with multiple consumers for load distribution and state that each delivery goes to one active consumer at a time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Default Exchange Coupling
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 9756 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; retain screen-reader-readable topology and delivery evidence; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Default Exchange Coupling.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Default Exchange Coupling, keep Default Exchange Coupling connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Task Cost Fairness · changed case · Lab Task Cost Fairness

Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; retain screen-reader-readable topology and delivery evidence; then exhaust retry age before attempts reach their maximum. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Worker Effect Evidence · changed case · Lab Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 4899 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then add a subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-worker-effect-evidence-evo1df" that uses case 7324 to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.
